posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Title says it all.

So far I can only move to a different group but I want to move the item to another board. For one I don’t want to clutter monday with new items, secondly I need the exact same item with the exact same ID because I use its ID as a reference for connection.
